name: failure-lesson
doc: PostToolUseFailure (core scope) matches the failing tool's error message against the error: triggers of MEMORY/LESSON.md and injects the one matching lesson as additionalContext. $TMP carries a package.json marker so projectRoot resolves to $TMP, and a LESSON.md whose single bullet is armed with [TRIGGERS error:EACCES]. The failure error 'EACCES: permission denied' matches, so the lesson text FAILLESSON is injected. Unit parity: test/failure-lesson.test.ts.

setup.content:
# LESSON.md

- [2026-07-05 10:00] FAILLESSON comply with the gate message, never retry verbatim
[TRIGGERS error:EACCES]

steps.doc: PostToolUseFailure → stdout additionalContext carries the error-triggered lesson.
